title: Craftable Saddle Recipe
description: Now craft your saddle and go for an adventure with your horse!!!
body:
# Craftable Saddle

**Ride First. Loot Later**. 

Let’s cut to the chase — Saddles are way too annoying to get. You can’t craft them in vanilla, and you’re stuck fishing, looting dungeons, or bribing villagers. This datapack fixes that. Just craft it and ride off into the sunset.

Note: “Saddle Recipe” is a custom recipe added by the datapack.If you are interested in motr datapacks check out hte links at the end of the description.

**🐖 Why It’s Better**

Because riding a pig shouldn’t require a treasure hunt. Whether you're gearing up for horse travel, pig races, or strider surfing in the Nether, this pack gives you the saddle without the struggle.

**📦 How To Use:**

1. Download the .zip
   
2. Drop it into your world’s datapacks/ folder
 
3. Type /reload in-game
 
4. Craft your Saddle and start riding like a boss
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
